title: The Middlemen: Pharmacy Benefit Manager Extraction

biosimilar_non_adoption_gap.headline: Biosimilar adoption suppressed to <2% despite FDA approval & cost advantage

adalimumab.mechanism: PBM formulary exclusion due to high rebate incentive from brand

insulin_glargine.mechanism: PBM formulary suppression of low-rebate biosimilar

filgrastim_counter_example.note: Provider-administered (Part B); PBM formulary leverage removed

formulary_manipulation.mechanism: Exclusion of cost-effective alternatives (generics, biosimilars) in favor of high-rebate branded drugs
formulary_manipulation.source: CMS biosimilar analysis; Chea et al. 2023; IQVIA

insulin_case_study.mechanism: PBM maintained high-list-price insulins on preferred formularies because high list prices = high rebates; excluded biosimilar alternatives

pbm_market_concentration.vertical_integration_status: All three integrated with insurance + pharmacy chains; specialty + mail-order ownership universal

regulatory_context.ftc_interim_report_1: July 2024; documented specialty drug markups, spread pricing, vertical integration harms
regulatory_context.ftc_interim_report_2: January 2025; focused on self-preferencing (PBM-owned specialty pharmacy gains)
regulatory_context.caa_2026: Signed February 3, 2026; mandates 100% rebate pass-through (effective 2029), spread pricing reporting, Part D delinking, expanded PBM definition
regulatory_context.ftc_litigation: Express Scripts settlement Feb 4, 2026 (projected $700M/year savings from one PBM); ongoing litigation vs Caremark and OptumRx
regulatory_context.state_reforms: 40+ states passed PBM reimbursement reform; spread pricing capped in many states

data_quality_notes.biosimilar_analysis: CMS Part D only; full US market (commercial + Medicaid) likely shows similar patterns but unavailable in single dataset
data_quality_notes.spread_pricing: Ohio audit is best-documented state case; extrapolation assumes similar rates nationally (conservative)
data_quality_notes.rebate_retention: Exact PBM retention rates proprietary; estimates based on government audits and legislative analysis
data_quality_notes.specialty_markup: FTC data covers 2017-2022; current rates may have shifted post-regulation
data_quality_notes.formulary_manipulation: Inferred from adoption gap analysis; direct causal attribution would require administrative records access (unavailable)

accounting_verification.verification_note: No double-counting across mechanisms; each addresses distinct extraction pathway
